evals.prompt: Generate customer-search.component.ts and customer-search.component.html from the attached ADF page. The Angular component should load search results via CustomerService, use reactive forms, and pass CustomerDto to the details route.
evals.expected_output: A complete API-backed Angular component and template with service calls, reactive forms, DTO-based routing, and no placeholder data.

evals.prompt: Convert the provided ADF JSF fragment into a static Bootstrap 5 mockup only. Preserve the tab layout, convert af:table to a responsive table, and do not include any Angular bindings.
evals.expected_output: A pure HTML fragment with Bootstrap structure that preserves the ADF hierarchy and contains no bindings or controller logic.
